message:
fix(server,share): add filtered archive directory scan, symlink-safe snapshot rebuilds, and archive path fix

- Add scan_directory_filtered() to archive browser that performs a
  recursive depth-first scan when a filter is active, collecting only
  entries whose names match the filter and bubbling up matching
  directories — previously filter was applied post-scan which loaded
  the entire tree into memory before discarding non-matches
- Short-circuit scan_directory_recursive to delegate to filtered variant
  when filter_lower is non-empty, avoiding redundant expansion tracking
- Apply symlink-safe validation to snapshot.rs: replace .exists() with
  symlink_metadata + is_file/is_dir checks for both source validation
  and destination collision detection in rebuild_sqlite_snapshot_with_pragmas,
  returning typed ShareError::Validation for non-regular-file sources
- Apply symlink-safe validation to parent directory creation in snapshot
  rebuild, using ensure_real_directory instead of create_dir_all
- Fix truthfulness integration test archive path from
  "{project}/.archive/messages" to "projects/{project}/messages"
  matching the actual archive storage layout
- Rustfmt fix in share lib.rs test for symlink chunk config assertion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
